content.full_text:
June 25, 2002

Daralyn Reed
Daralyn Reed Company
504 Hillcrest Drive
Yreka, CA 96097

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-168

Dear Ms. Reed:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation of June 25, 2002, you have withdrawn your request for written advice.

If you have any additional questions, please feel free to call me toll-free at 866/275-3772.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Kevin S. Moen, PhD
Political Reform Consultant II
Technical Assistance Division
